title: not enough enchants
description: this is a mod that add more enchants becuese minecraft doesnt have engouh!
body:
adds all sorts of new enchants here is a list (with short description) of what it adds!

- boom, explodes on death how higher the level how bigger the explosion is (chestplate only)
- jumper, gives you jumpboost depending on the level (boots only)
- speed, gives you speed depending on the level (boots only)
- icing, gives a slowing effect when you hit a player (for weapons)
- bleeding, makes your enemies bleed when hit!
- smash, smash with your weapon on the ground!
- gardening, replace your crops when u break them!
- uppercut, launch your enimies into the sky when u hit them!
- Air jump, lets you jump in midair!
- Thunderstrike, make your oponents feel the lightning (starts with a base chance of 5% inceases to a max of 25% on max lvl 5, if it storms the chance is doubled.)
- Tiny, a enchantment with 5 levels that makes you a tiny bit smaller each level (up to half height, leggings only)
- Bloodlust (weapons), with this enchantment whenever you hit a entity theres a small chance u will steal half a heart from them! (chance increases every level, max level 3)


- please note, the 1.20.1 forge versions wont be updated to include the new content

there will be more added in the future! :D
